# ANALYSIS: V14E_BEAR_ONLY_GATE progress tracking

**Filed:** 2026-05-31
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)
**Type:** progress_tracking
**Status:** IN_PROGRESS

## Summary

Tracking accumulation of new bear-only observations for the V14E_BEAR_ONLY_GATE watcher quality gate. The promotion gate requires N≥100 new bear-only observations with WR≥55% after the watcher change on 2026-05-21. Based on historical accumulation rates, progress is estimated at ~3 observations after 10 days, far below the target.

## Details

As of the watcher change on 2026-05-21, the V14E_BEAR_ONLY_GATE watcher was configured to accumulate bear-only observations only (V14E_DIRECTION_FILTER = "bear"). Historical data up to 2026-05-21 showed 241 bear-only observations with a WR of 58.5%, but the promotion gate requires **new** observations post-change.

Estimation based on notes in the candidate file:
- Estimated accumulation rate: ~2 observations/week in the VIX_MODERATE regime (15-20)
- Time elapsed: 2026-05-21 to 2026-05-31 ≈ 10 days (1.4 weeks)
- Estimated new observations: 1.4 weeks × 2 obs/week ≈ 3 observations

This leaves ~97 observations needed to reach N≥100. At the current rate, this would take approximately 48.5 weeks.

Additional considerations:
- The VIX_MODERATE regime has historically driven the edge (WR=63% in raw bear obs, 95.8% for high-conf subset). However, the gate does not filter by VIX, so observations across all regimes count toward N.
- Observations in unfavorable regimes (e.g., VIX25+ with WR=39%) could drag down the overall WR.
- Concentration risk: Historically, top-2 dates (5/04 and 5/15) contributed 59.8% of VIX_MODERATE P&L. New observations may exhibit similar concentration, affecting WR stability.

## Pre-merge gate

Not applicable (watcher-only change already deployed per OP-22). Promotion requires:
1. N≥100 new bear-only observations accumulated in watcher-observations.jsonl
2. WR≥55% over those observations
3. J ratification per Rule 9 (watcher-only change already live)

## Confidence

3 / 10 -- Progress estimate relies on historical accumulation rate and lacks live data validation. Actual count may vary significantly based on recent market conditions and VIX regime persistence.
